RECOIL_HOLD_MS_comment: When ammo = 0, burst fire shot speed changes. First burst fire shot > small gap > second burst fire shot > large gap > restart from first burst fire shot.

P1.RECOIL_comment: Alternative recoil triggers can include: 0x005A87B0 > 0 for trigger press in-game for P1; 0x005B494B > 0 for a shot countdown
P1.DAMAGE_comment: 0x005A8138 > 0 when the red DAMAGE text appears on-screen for both players

P2.RECOIL_comment: Alternative recoil triggers can include: 0x005A87B1 > 0 for trigger press in-game for P2; 0x005B49CF > 0 for a shot countdown
P2.DAMAGE_comment: 0x005A8138 > 0 when the red DAMAGE text appears on-screen for both players
